patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the constructor always using the default time zone instead of the provided time zone. The fix involves modifying the constructor to correctly use the provided time zone.
patches.changes:
- this(time, RegularTimePeriod.DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE, Locale.getDefault());
+ this(time, zone, Locale.getDefault());
patches.diff:
- this(time, RegularTimePeriod.DEFAULT_TIME_ZONE, Locale.getDefault());
+ this(time, zone, Locale.getDefault());
